analysis.consistency: Consistent with standard D&D 5e naming conventions and mechanics for Channel Divinity abilities.
analysis.quality: High. The description is clear, comprehensive, and accurately reflects the source material (PHB). All necessary mechanical components (action cost, range, saving throw, effect duration, and resulting creature behavior) are present.

mechanics.effect: Turned (Cannot approach caster, must use Dash/Escape, can Dodge if unable to move)
mechanics.duration: 1 minute or until the creature takes any damage
mechanics.trigger_condition: Undead must see or hear the caster
mechanics.subclass_relevance: This is the core Level 2 Cleric Channel Divinity feature, though the provided metadata incorrectly flags it as 'is_subclass_feature':true (it is a base class feature at Cleric level 2, not a subclass feature). Mechanically, the description is sound.

recommendations.description: The field 'is_subclass_feature':true should likely be 'false' or the level adjusted, as Turn Undead is a core Cleric class feature gained at level 2, not a subclass feature (like those gained at level 3).

analysis.data_archivist_notes: The mechanical description is perfect. Minor inconsistency noted only in the associated metadata tag regarding subclass status.
